channel.title: Jane Riveros — Notes
channel.description: Field notes from Jane Riveros on building governed AI agents with the discipline of regulated financial-services delivery.

item.title: The EU AI Act deadline that matter more than you think
item.description: The July 22 signatory deadline for chatbot disclosure and deepfake labeling under the EU AI Act is real, and many organizations are not ready. Let’s see how this continues to shape around the world in favor of transparency

item.title: Tax compliance is the canary in the AI coal mine
item.description: Manufacturers rushing to deploy AI often overlook tax implications until audit season. Wolters Kluwer shows that responsible AI research can surface impacts early, but the real lesson is for governance teams everywhere.

item.title: When Bannon and Sanders agree on AI regulation, pay attention
item.description: Steve Bannon and Bernie Sanders share almost nothing politically, but both call for AI regulation. That rare alignment is a signal that governance practitioners need to stop waiting and start building measured compliance frameworks now.

item.title: Why I build AI agents like regulated programs
item.description: MAVIS and Victoria aren't demos — they're production agents built with governance gates, audit trails, and permission-scoped access. Here's the discipline I carried from the bank to the build.
